title: Usopp Follows the Tontatta
description: Pages 6–10 focus on usopp follows the tontatta, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Doflamingo, Unknown person #6 as the underground operation advances as Usopp, Robin, the Tontatta, and Franky move toward the factory and Sugar.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've come to save this land!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Uwah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Remember, you're

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Guhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: W-Who are you people...!?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufuff- Fuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuf- Fuffu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My name is Don- Quixote Dofla- Mingo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ?...pl- Rates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...they took down the Royal Army for us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Now fall....!! Give in to the mayhem.

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: TreBol...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: PICA,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Diamante!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Remember, because

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Come and take out this country's trash.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: So in just a single night...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The country fell into Dofla- Mingo's hands.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: What a story... a real night- mare!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Such a cunning man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: conference yourself

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: UUUUGA... UGA!! I... I!! I'll NEVER forgive you!!! Doflamingo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: At the time, we, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: believed that King Riku had gone mad.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: We made contact with the new King, Doflamingo, but you can see how that turned out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I'm Asham- Ed for having ever doubted King Riku....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I see. That's awful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: The King that everyone had loved...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Was sent to his death for a crime he hadn't committed....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: No... King Riku still lives!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: At the time, Doflamingo was intrigued by Princess Viola's ability,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: So she made a deal with him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: If you promise not to kill father...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I will serve under you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: She is also still alive, serving as one of his subordi- nates...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: As one of the family's officers...

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: She changed her name to Violet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: An officer!? So thanks to the Princess, King Riku is still...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I'm not sure

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: ...Yes. He's definitely still alive, somewhere in this country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: But I cannot fathom the pain the King must have endured these past ten years....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Nor the pain in Viola- Sama's Heart!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Fear... anger... tears...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: What a decade for them to bear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Nor can I imagine the suffering...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Of those soldiers, who, along with King Riku, were manipu- Lated against their will into striking down the people before them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: But weren't king Riku's men killed on that night...

summary: Usopp Follows the Tontatta focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Doflamingo as the underground operation advances as Usopp, Robin, the Tontatta, and Franky move toward the factory and Sugar.
